spec.name: Mockup Kit · Balsamiq Style
spec.description: HTML→Figma mapping ruleset. Drives the HTML-to-Figma plugin so that elements rendered with this CSS kit are converted into Figma nodes that bind to the corresponding Figma Variables, Text Styles and Component Instances.

radii.comment: border-radius:50% used for avatars / round buttons

components.disabledReason: Pure padding container — registering as a component swallows unexpected children (buttons, inputs). Treat as a generic frame instead; Figma variables will still restore padding/spacing.

rules.description: If a node does not match any component, render as a Figma Frame with auto-layout inferred from computed style.
Leaf text nodes become Figma Text and bind to the closest text style by (fontSize + weight) lookup.

matcherSemantics.selector: Standard CSS selector applied to the element being evaluated.
matcherSemantics.attr: Sugar — element.hasAttribute(value); when paired with 'equals', element.getAttribute(value) === equals.
matcherSemantics.isLeafText: Element has no element children but has non-empty textContent.
matcherSemantics.from:ownText: Use textContent of this element only (excluding child element text).
matcherSemantics.from:styleWidth: Read width % from inline style of the matched child.
matcherSemantics.from:computed*: Read the corresponding property via getComputedStyle.
matcherSemantics.stopRecursion: Once an element is matched as a component instance, do not recurse into its children — slots have already pulled what we need.
